notes: Opening-window boards must not collapse into an immediate tactical finish under the local Stockfish smoke check.
Near-miss opening boards must stay free of immediate tactical termination.
Preemption nasty negatives must remain tactically sane.
Distributed-contact exact rows should stay calm enough to test multi-sector contact rather than a large material or tactical edge.
Central-only contact near misses should stay calm enough to isolate the missing outer-sector contact boundary.
Contested-only distributed fronts must remain tactically sane.
Endgame race rows must not be immediate tactical mates.
One-sided runner near misses must remain outside trivial mates.
Blockaded race negatives must remain outside trivial mates.
Attack scaffold boards must show pressure without collapsing into an immediate forced mate.
Off-theater attack near misses must not be trivial mates.
Carrier-only attack negatives must remain tactically sane.
Fortress exact boards should stay outside immediate mate and outside large tactical eval spikes.
Fortress near misses should stay calm enough to test shell occupancy rather than tactics.
Fortress direct-entry negatives should stay calm enough to isolate the entry-law failure.
King-safety exact boards may be sharp, but must not already be an immediate forced mate.
Single-hole near misses should stay calm enough to validate the hole-count boundary rather than a tactical shot.
Non-adjacent-hole negatives must not be immediate mates.
Central-contact exact rows should stay calm enough to test the connected central front itself rather than a separate eval spike.
Single-touch central rows must not be immediate mates.
Contested-only central rows must remain tactically sane.
Certification-row engine bundles anchor comparative development verdicts without tying truth to one numeric score.
Near-miss development rows still need an engine bundle because comparative certification remains engine-backed.
Late-development nasty negatives stay linked to engine/probe bundles for comparative sanity.
Best-defense development rows must carry an engine bundle for support-only degradation checks.
Initiative-window certification rows need engine bundles for denial and best-defense survival.
Near-miss initiative rows remain engine-backed because rival counterplay survival matters.
Initiative nasty negatives keep engine linkage for counterplay-denial audits.
Best-defense initiative rows must preserve engine bundle linkage for deferred fail-closed behavior.
Mobility comparison rows need engine bundles for comparative superiority rather than wording alone.
Near-miss mobility rows stay engine-backed for comparative calibration.
Mobility nasty negatives keep engine bundles for symmetry and false-edge checks.
Thin mobility edges must carry engine bundles so support-only degradation remains testable.
Comparative king-fragility rows still carry engine bundles because certification stays comparative.
Near-miss fragility rows remain engine-backed for comparative burden checks.
King-fragility nasty negatives keep engine linkage for false asymmetry control.
Support-only comparative king-fragility rows retain engine/probe bundles.
Certified king-safety-edge rows require engine bundles for comparative and best-defense burdens.
Near-miss king-safety-edge rows remain engine-backed to prevent shell-only overclaim.
King-safety-edge nasty negatives keep engine linkage for phase and host-viability separation.
Deferred king-safety-edge rows must preserve engine bundle linkage for fail-closed best-defense review.
Mate-net certification may already be forcing, so the budget allows immediate mating lines.
Near-miss mate-net rows must stay outside immediate short mates.
Mate-net nasty negatives must stay outside immediate short mates.
Deferred mate-net rows must not already collapse into a short forced mate.
Material-harvest certification rows stay engine-backed for realized tactical conversion checks.
Near-miss material-harvest rows remain engine-backed because tactical realization is burdened.
Material-harvest nasty negatives keep engine linkage for trade-vs-harvest separation.
Support-only material-harvest rows preserve engine bundle linkage for thin-branch review.
Winning-endgame certification rows require engine bundles for route survival and best defense.
Near-miss winning-endgame rows remain engine-backed because route survival is unresolved.
Winning-endgame nasty negatives keep engine linkage for result-vs-advantage separation.
Deferred winning-endgame rows preserve engine bundle linkage for fail-closed route audits.
Fortress-draw certification rows need engine bundles for hold survival rather than shell wording.
Near-miss fortress rows remain engine-backed because entry resources can break the hold.
Fortress nasty negatives keep engine linkage for entry-lane rejection checks.
Support-only fortress rows preserve engine bundles for thin hold branches.
Perpetual-check-holding rows keep engine bundles for repetition survival rather than attack prose.
Near-miss perpetual rows remain engine-backed because loose checks are not enough.
Perpetual nasty negatives keep engine linkage for check-sequence false positives.
Deferred perpetual rows preserve engine bundle linkage for best-defense break checks.
Promotion-race certification rows need engine bundles for route survival over broad race wording.
Near-miss promotion-race rows remain engine-backed because one-sided passers are insufficient.
Promotion-race nasty negatives keep engine linkage for blockade and reply-route checks.
Deferred promotion-race rows preserve engine bundle linkage for best-defense route survival review.
